Title: Kayle
Age: Current1006 – 1009 years old Timeline Born13 BN – 10 BN Edit

children.title: Early life
children.textContent: Kayle and her twin sister Morgana were born on Mount Targon during the height of the Rune Wars to Kilam and Mihira, the current Aspect of Justice. Due to Mihira ascending while pregnant, the sisters were born with a fraction of her celestial power. As the war raged on, Mihira's celestial power began to overshadow her personality and affections as she dedicated more and more of her time to her duties as an aspect. Fearing what Mihira was becoming, as well as the enemies drawn to her light, Kilam resolved to take their daughters to safety. He fled Targon with his children and they would sail to the land that would be known as Demacia.

children.title: Battle with the Darkin Blade
children.textContent: When Demacia was beset by the Darkin Aatrox and his army, Kayle and Morgana donned their armor, and stood against them at the city's walls. While they easily destroyed the first wave, they sensed danger approaching from the skies and took flight. The Winged Protectors engaged in a deadly battle with Aatrox, but the Darkin overpowered the sisters. In her final stand, Morgana put her sword near and bound Aatrox with chains of dark celestial fire. Taking Morgana's sword, Kayle empowered her wings and swords with celestial flames and burned away his mortal vessel.

children.title: Battle of the Winged Sisters and Departure
children.textContent:
When a sinner knelt before Kayle, begging for forgiveness, she prepared to execute him. However, Morgana stayed her hand and insisted he deserved chance at redemption. Despite her soldiers' desire for punishment, Kayle's love for her sister led her to allow Morgana to redeem him. An uneasy accord was struck between the sisters and their followers, allowing Morgana rehabilitate wrongdoers who appeared humble enough to admit their guilt.

Their agreement would not last long as Kayle's most zealous followers began to conspire against Morgana, led by her protege Ronas. When Kayle away, Ronas attempted to arrest Morgana, but she unleashed her shackles against him, killing him.

When Kayle returned to the city, she found the people rioting and Ronas dead. Consumed by rage, Kayle swore to bring his killer to justice and summoned her celestial fire to cleanse the city of sinners. Morgana met her in skies, declaring that if she wanted to purge the darkness, then she should start with her. They raised their blades and fought across the heavens, matching each other's blows. As the sisters clashed, collateral damage caused by their strikes sundered the buildings beneath them to rubble. Their battle was only interrupted by the anguished cry of their father. Morgana tossed her sword at Kayle and flew down to search for Killam, only to find him mortally wounded.

As Morgana held him in his final moments, Kayle landed dumbstruck. Morgana demanded to know if her justice would have involved smiting their father for the crime of stealing them away from their mother. Unable to answer and crying because of loss, Kayle took Morgana's sword and left Demacia. Kayle resolved to never let mortal emotions rule her again and flew for Mount Targon. There, she would seek out her mother and stand by her side to fulfill her legacy to the Aspect of Justice.

children.title: Journey to Targon Prime
children.textContent:
Even though Kayle has been absent from Demacia for many centuries, her last legacy inspired Demacia's culture, law, and architecture. The myth of the Winged Protectors morphed until only Kayle was remembered. Many pray to the Protector in times of chaos, and hope that she might return, some pray that such a day will never come.

For centuries, Morgana has tried to find her sister, and written down her findings on her journal. A Solari warrior reported a sighting of a winged creature on the peaks of the mountain, ascending higher. A wind mage said that a bright flame streaked through the air, spinning away faster and faster. A Demacian noble was convinced that the Winged Protector was still alive, so he sent out riders to track her. After decades, the riders found a single white feather beneath Targon. A Lunari child, in the middle of the night, said that he saw a winged ghost, flying around the mountain. Yet, his mother did not believe him.

Many centuries passed, Morgana heard a voice. A lonely, so distant prayer. She had no idea where it came from, but she was so sure that Kayle was praying to her. However, her prayers remained unanswered. Morgana believes that if she were to reveal herself once more to Demacia, Kayle would return as well, but the nation would not be ready for her judgment.

mainContent.title: Appearance
mainContent.textContent:
Kayle is a slim and relatively muscular woman with pale, slightly tanned skin, short cyan hair with a bang on the right side, burning sun-gold eyes with white pupils and pointy ears. She has four wings on her back and two wings on her waist that vary in cyan blue and light gold. She was ascended between her twenties and thirties, so her aging has stopped since then.

Kayle's clothing consists of golden armor that covers most of her body and brown clothes. Kayle wore a helmet that covered her face when she was the Winged Protector, but after her journey to Targon and her ascension into a more powerful form, she stopped wearing it.

mainContent.title: Personality
mainContent.textContent:
Kayle is an incarnation of justice. While her sister Morgana represents restorative justice and advocates for the repentant, Kayle represents retributive justice and punishes in the fairest way possible, those who committed crimes without mercy and without taking into account various factors about a person, such as motives, origin, social status, etc. Despite wanting to make the world more just and fighting to protect the innocent and righteous, her lack of empathy towards sinners and zeal make her quite stoic and cold. She only seeks to punish sinners on an idealistic eye-to-eye level, without forgiveness, as she thinks it necessary to protect people.

Kayle has big zeal towards the bringing of justice and punishing evil in all it's forms, no matter if it would be common criminals, tyrant kings or world threats. She is very proud of her destiny and occupation as Aspect of Justice and constantly tries to transcend even more and achieve perfect celestial clarity about justice. While she seems to be cold towards most people, especially towards sinners, she very much cares about her family and friends.

After the duel between her and Morgana, she began rejecting her mortal and emotional parts, as she considered them the main reason this tragedy ever happened, and that became a source of her emotional trauma. Since traveling to Targon Prime and spending some time with Mihira, she seems to stop denying her emotions, probably thanks to Mihira's guidance and teachings. Mihira approves of Kayle's ideals, but she also doesn't want Kayle to lose herself in them. Right now, Kayle is continuing to fight evil, protect innocents and strive for constant improvement and self-ascension, she dreams of building a paradise for the just and glorious, sharing Mihira's ideals.

children.title: Morgana
children.textContent: Kayle and Morgana are twin siblings, Kayle being the older of the two by a second. During their time living in Demacia, they were known as the Winged Protectors and saved countless lives. Despite their diffirences, they always tried to work together and serve their noble goal. Their relationship soured after the event that lead to the death of their father, and they often clash, both in their attitude towards justice, and focusing on the Celestial/Human parts of themselves, but deep down they still love each other since they still need each other.

children.title: Mihira
children.textContent: Mihira is Kayle's mother. She approves Kayle's noble ideals about justice and building a better world for the righteous, guiding her and trying to prevent Kayle from losing herself in her ambitions. Kayle extremely respects her mother, seeing Mihira as the savior of the world and a mentor to her. Mihira is the biggest reason why Kayle has chosen the path of fighting for justice and building a better world.

children.title: Aatrox
children.textContent: Kayle and Morgana defeat Aatrox during his attack on an ancient Demacian City that they protected back in the days when they were the Winged Protectors. Aatrox and Kayle have radically clashing personalities and therefore hate each other.

children.title: Ryze
children.textContent: Kayle considers Ryze as her old friend, and Ryze likewise shows a good attitude towards Kayle, but the details of their friendship are unknown.

children.title: Xolaani
children.textContent: Kayle knows about Xolaani's existence and seems to have fought against her in the past. In the Darkin Saga alternate universe, she faces her once again, with different possible outcomes, including the smiting of Xolaani by Kayle or Xolaani possessing the celestial body of Mihira.

children.title: Sylas
children.textContent: Sylas knows certain truths about the Winged Protectors and uses their power during the events of Lux comics and Mageseeker. He eventually learns the truth about them from Morgana herself and was given one of Kayle's feathers as a blessing.
